best_for_commercial: Best for product photo → 30s broadcast ad
best_for_pika: Best for photo storyboards with custom transitions
best_for_t2v: Best for: text-to-video with any of the 10 latest models
best_for_wan_v2v: Best for keeping motion, swapping style
model_desc_commercial-pipeline: End-to-end ad workflow: AI director plans shots, smart-enhance, voiceover with phoneme-accurate lip-sync, 4K upscale. From product photo to broadcast-ready 30s spot in one click.
model_desc_pika-v2.2-pikaframes: Multi-keyframe storyboarding (Pika exclusive). Drop up to 5 reference frames + custom transitions; ideal for product shots, anime morphs, and cinematic story beats.
model_desc_sam3-video: Object segmentation + remove/replace via natural language. Powered by Meta SAM 3.1 — say what to erase, the model tracks and inpaints frame by frame.
model_desc_text-to-video: 10 frontier T2V models in one place: WAN 2.7, Veo 3.1, Kling 3.0, Hailuo 2.3, Seedance 2.0, LTX 2.3, Pixverse V6, Luma Ray 2, Vidu Q3, OVI. Pick any of them, write one prompt, generate.
model_desc_wan-2.1-v2v: Video style transfer keeping original motion. Drop a clip, describe the new look (anime, cyberpunk, oil-painting); audio + lip-sync preserved.
